name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Backend engineer focused on API design, transactional systems, and production reliability for customer-facing products.

bullets: Designed and shipped order, settlement, and partner APIs for high-volume commerce workflows.
Reduced incident recovery time by improving service-level monitoring, runbooks, and alert routing.
Led schema and query tuning for PostgreSQL services handling critical payment and order paths.
Built internal workflow services and admin tools used by operations and customer success teams.
Introduced asynchronous job handling and queue-based retry policies for external integrations.

projects.name: Partner Sync Platform
projects.subtitle: Integration and reconciliation tooling
bullets: Implemented a partner data sync service with retryable ingestion pipelines and reconciliation reports.
Added audit trails and operator controls to reduce manual recovery work during partner incidents.
